title: Tehran denies claims of progress in peace talks, as Trump declares war ‘won’
summary_full: President Donald Trump said that peace negotiations with representatives from Iran were ongoing: “They want to make a deal so badly.”
summary_public: President Donald Trump said that peace negotiations with representatives from Iran were ongoing: “They want to make a deal so badly.”

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Tehran denies claims of progress in peace talks
